chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4420 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "إِنَّ طَلاَقَكُمُ اَلثَّلاَثَ لاَ يَحِلُّ لِغَيْرِكُمْ وَ طَلاَقَهُمْ يَحِلُّ لَكُمْ لِأَنَّكُمْ لاَ تَرَوْنَ اَلثَّلاَثَ شَيْئاً وَ هُمْ يُوجِبُونَهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4420 - And in another narration, Imam (as) said: "Indeed, your triple divorce does not become permissible for others, but their divorce becomes permissible for you because you do not consider the triple divorce as binding, whereas they deem it obligatory."
